content:
RORK вЂ” FINAL INSTAGRAM-STYLE MODULE DELIVERY, DEPLOYMENT, AND REAL-DEVICE VERIFICATION

STOP ALL OTHER TASKS.

The previous task did not fully verify:

- Members loading
- Module cards
- Reels
- Video upload
- Image upload
- Progressive loading
- Pagination
- Infinite scroll
- Caching
- Live production data
- No flickering
- No loading loops
- No duplicate items
- Real-device runtime behavior

Do not return another code-only report.

Do not use PASS вЂ” CODE as final proof.

The objective is to deploy the final application and prove on a physical Android device that the major modules load progressively using production social-app techniques similar to Instagram.

Use standard Expo React Native, Supabase, API, storage, CDN, caching, pagination, virtualization, and background-refresh methods.

Do not claim access to InstagramвЂ™s private source code.

в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ
STEP 1 вЂ” FREEZE THE FINAL BUILD
в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ

Return:

- GitHub repository
- production branch
- full GitHub SHA
- Render deployment ID
- backend SHA
- /health SHA
- APK filename
- versionName
- versionCode
- APK SHA-256
- APK embedded SHA
- diagnostics SHA

Required:

GitHub SHA
=
backend SHA
=
/health SHA
=
APK embedded SHA
=
diagnostics SHA

If any value differs:

- stop
- rebuild or redeploy
- repeat alignment
- do not continue testing

в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ
STEP 2 вЂ” MEMBERS MODULE ROOT AUDIT
в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ

Audit the complete Members flow:

1. production query
2. table or endpoint used
3. page size
4. cursor or pagination key
5. first-page request
6. next-page request
7. deduplication
8. search
9. filters
10. avatars
11. image caching
12. realtime inserts
13. realtime updates
14. realtime deletes
15. offline cache
16. background refresh
17. empty state
18. error state
19. retry
20. loading footer

Return:

- file
- line
- function
- API/database source
- page size
- cursor strategy
- cache key
- realtime channel
- exact remaining defect

Required implementation:

- initial page size: 20
- render first page immediately
- load next page near list end
- stable member ID
- deduplicate by member ID
- debounce search
- thumbnail avatar in list
- full image only in detail
- background refresh
- no full-screen loader after first page
- no loading all members at once
- no duplicate members
- no fake members
- no placeholder totals

в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ
STEP 3 вЂ” MEMBERS REAL-DEVICE QA
в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ

On the final APK:

1. Open Members.
2. Confirm first 20 real members render.
3. Record initial load time.
4. Scroll to the bottom.
5. Confirm next page loads.
6. Confirm loading footer appears only during next-page fetch.
7. Confirm existing rows remain visible.
8. Confirm no full-screen reload.
9. Confirm no duplicate rows.
10. Confirm avatars load progressively.
11. Search for an existing member.
12. Clear search.
13. Confirm list returns without refetch loop.
14. Add a clearly labeled temporary test member.
15. Confirm it appears through realtime or background refresh.
16. Edit the test member.
17. Confirm the row updates.
18. Delete or archive the test member.
19. Confirm it disappears.
20. Remove all test data.

Required evidence:

- first-page count
- second-page count
- total unique IDs
- duplicate count
- initial-load latency
- next-page latency
- screen recording
- trace IDs
- API or Supabase logs

Mark VERIFIED only as:

PASS вЂ” REAL DEVICE

в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ
STEP 4 вЂ” MODULE CARD ARCHITECTURE
в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ

Audit every main card shown on:

- Home
- Invest
- Market
- Portfolio
- Chat
- Profile
- CRM
- Admin
- Business Overview

For every card verify:

- card source
- live query
- cached data
- loading state
- empty state
- error state
- retry
- navigation target
- role visibility
- stale data behavior

Remove:

- hardcoded totals
- placeholder values
- mock cards
- demo values
- global blocking loader
- duplicate requests

Required card behavior:

- cached content displays immediately when available
- skeleton card displays when no cache exists
- each card loads independently
- one failed card does not block the screen
- no card causes the entire page to re-render repeatedly
- card size remains fixed during loading
- no layout jumping
- no flicker
- no stale internal metrics on public/member Home

Internal business metrics must remain only in protected Admin/Owner areas.

в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ
STEP 5 вЂ” MODULE CARD REAL-DEVICE QA
в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ

Test every card individually.

For each card return:

- card name
- route
- data source
- first render time
- live data result
- tap/navigation result
- offline result
- refresh result
- error recovery
- PASS or FAIL

Required:

- card appears without full-page blocking
- live values match production source
- tap opens correct module
- no placeholder value
- no visible layout jump
- no repeated request loop

в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ
STEP 6 вЂ” REELS ROOT-CAUSE AUDIT
в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ

Audit the entire Reels implementation:

1. feed query
2. ordering
3. pagination
4. deduplication
5. player component
6. active index
7. viewability logic
8. autoplay
9. pause
10. preload
11. thumbnail
12. playback URL
13. signed URL expiry
14. cache
15. app background handling
16. tab switching
17. upload
18. processing
19. publish
20. likes
21. comments
22. shares
23. saves
24. retry
25. offline behavior

Find and return every remaining issue with:

- file
- line
- function
- root cause
- exact fix
- verification result

Search for:

- state updates during render
- changing effect dependencies
- unstable engagement objects
- duplicate feed requests
- duplicate video IDs
- too-large windowSize
- multiple active players
- black-frame conditions
- expired playback URLs
- direct original-file playback
- list keys based on index
- full-feed fetches
- repeated query invalidation

в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ
STEP 7 вЂ” INSTAGRAM-STYLE REELS IMPLEMENTATION
в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ

Required feed behavior:

- cursor-based pagination
- initial page: 5 to 10 reels
- next-page prefetch near the end
- cached first page
- stale-while-revalidate
- deduplicate by reel ID
- stable deterministic ordering
- pull-to-refresh
- per-page retry
- no complete feed reload after every interaction

Required player behavior:

- only visible reel plays
- previous reel pauses immediately
- next reel preloads
- off-screen players release resources
- app background pauses playback
- tab change pauses playback
- one audio stream only
- poster image displays before video
- failed video shows Retry
- no permanent black frame
- no flickering between items

Required list behavior:

- FlatList or FlashList
- stable keyExtractor
- tuned initialNumToRender
- tuned maxToRenderPerBatch
- tuned windowSize
- fixed item dimensions
- viewabilityConfig
- paging/snapping
- no nested scroll conflict

в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ
STEP 8 вЂ” REELS REAL-DEVICE QA
в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ

On the final APK:

1. Open Reels.
2. Confirm first reel poster appears immediately.
3. Confirm visible reel autoplays.
4. Scroll to second reel.
5. Confirm first reel pauses.
6. Confirm second reel plays.
7. Confirm third reel preloads.
8. Scroll through at least 20 reels.
9. Confirm pagination loads more.
10. Confirm no duplicate reel IDs.
11. Confirm no black frames.
12. Confirm no two videos play together.
13. Background the app.
14. Confirm video pauses.
15. Return to the app.
16. Confirm correct reel resumes according to policy.
17. Switch tabs.
18. Confirm reel pauses.
19. Return.
20. Confirm correct reel resumes.
21. Like one reel.
22. Confirm persistence.
23. Comment.
24. Confirm persistence.
25. Save.
26. Confirm persistence.
27. Share.
28. Confirm share sheet.
29. Force-stop and reopen.
30. Confirm feed and engagement state reload correctly.

Return:

- number of reels tested
- unique reel count
- duplicate count
- playback failures
- black-frame count
- simultaneous-player count
- pagination latency
- screen recording
- trace IDs

Required:

PASS вЂ” REAL DEVICE

в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ
STEP 9 вЂ” VIDEO UPLOAD PIPELINE
в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ

Test and verify the complete video pipeline:

1. select video
2. permission handling
3. local preview
4. file validation
5. duration validation
6. size validation
7. upload URL creation
8. resumable/multipart upload
9. progress display
10. cancel
11. retry
12. database record
13. processing status
14. thumbnail generation
15. optimized playback asset
16. publish
17. feed appearance
18. deletion

Required statuses:

- selected
- uploading
- uploaded
- processing
- ready
- failed

Rules:

- app remains usable during upload
- upload retry does not create duplicates
- failed upload shows exact error
- reel enters feed only when ready
- original file is not used as list thumbnail
- optimized rendition is used for playback where available

в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ
STEP 10 вЂ” IMAGE UPLOAD AND DELIVERY
в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ

Apply and verify for:

- member avatars
- project images
- deal images
- property images
- landing media
- CRM contact images

Required:

- local preview
- compressed upload
- thumbnail variant
- medium variant
- original retained only if required
- cache headers
- CDN or verified optimized storage delivery
- fixed dimensions
- retry
- progress
- error state

No list screen may wait for full-resolution images.

в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ
STEP 11 вЂ” ALL MODULES PROGRESSIVE LOADING
в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ

Apply and verify to:

- Members: page 20
- Investors: page 20
- Projects: page 10
- Deals: page 10
- Properties: page 10
- Reels: page 5вЂ“10
- Transactions: page 20
- Notifications: page 20
- Messages: page 20вЂ“30
- CRM contacts: page 20
- Comments: page 20

Every module must have:

- stable IDs
- server-side pagination
- cached first page
- background refresh
- next-page footer
- deduplication
- pull-to-refresh
- empty state
- error state
- retry
- offline state
- no full-screen reload after first page

Return implementation and runtime evidence for every module.

в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ
STEP 12 вЂ” PERFORMANCE AND MEMORY
в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ

Measure on a physical Android device:

- Home initial render time
- Members first-page time
- Members next-page time
- Reels first-frame time
- Reels scroll smoothness
- video startup latency
- image load latency
- memory before Reels
- memory after 20 reels
- memory after leaving Reels
- API request count
- duplicate request count
- active video-player count
- listener count

Required:

- bounded memory growth
- one active video player
- zero duplicate query loops
- zero duplicate listeners
- no Maximum Update Depth
- no black screen
- no infinite spinner
- no layout jumping

в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ
STEP 13 вЂ” LIVE PRODUCTION DATA VERIFICATION
в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ

For every module confirm:

- production source
- real record count
- no mock data
- no placeholder data
- no hardcoded cards
- no test project leakage
- no demo members
- no fake investors
- no fake reels
- no stale totals

Return the data source and sample record IDs in masked form.

в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ
STEP 14 вЂ” DEPLOYMENT
в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ

After fixes:

1. Commit changes.
2. Push to the production branch.
3. Verify GitHub remote HEAD.
4. Deploy Render from that SHA.
5. Verify /health.
6. Build signed APK from that SHA.
7. Embed SHA in diagnostics.
8. Produce direct APK link.
9. Install on physical Android device.
10. Run Steps 3, 5, 8, 9, 10, 11, and 12.

Required alignment:

GitHub remote SHA
=
Render SHA
=
/health SHA
=
APK embedded SHA
=
diagnostics SHA

в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ
STEP 15 вЂ” FINAL QA MATRIX
в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ

Return a table containing at least:

1. Members first page
2. Members pagination
3. Members search
4. Members avatars
5. Members realtime insert
6. Members realtime update
7. Members delete/archive
8. Home cards
9. Invest cards
10. Market cards
11. Portfolio cards
12. CRM cards
13. Admin cards
14. Card live data
15. Card navigation
16. Card offline cache
17. Card retry
18. Reels first page
19. Reels autoplay
20. Reels single-player
21. Reels preload
22. Reels pagination
23. Reels no duplicates
24. Reels no black frames
25. Reels background pause
26. Reels tab pause
27. Reel like
28. Reel comment
29. Reel save
30. Reel share
31. Video upload
32. Video progress
33. Video processing
34. Video publish
35. Video retry
36. Image upload
37. Image thumbnails
38. Project pagination
39. Deal pagination
40. Investor pagination
41. Notification pagination
42. CRM pagination
43. Offline behavior
44. Network recovery
45. No full-screen reload
